yaml_definition:
name: search_orders
description: Search and list orders with optional filters by order name, order ID, user, or date
method: GET
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: 订单名称
      in: query
    id:
      type: string
      description: 订单ID (Order ID to filter by)
      in: query
    user:
      type: string
      description: 下单人
      in: query
    date:
      type: string
      description: 下单时间
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: List of orders matching the search criteria
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: Unique order identifier
          name:
            type: string
            description: Order/product name
          user:
            type: string
            description: Name of the person who placed the order
          amount:
            type: integer
            description: Order amount in currency units
          status:
            type: string
            description: Order status (e.g., paid, shipped, pending, cancelled)
          time:
            type: string
            description: Order date
    total:
      type: integer
      description: Total number of orders in the result
name: search_orders
description: Search and list orders with optional filters by order name, order ID, user, or date

id.description: 订单ID (Order ID to filter by)

data.description: List of orders matching the search criteria

user.description: Name of the person who placed the order

status.description: Order status (e.g., paid, shipped, pending, cancelled)

total.description: Total number of orders in the result
